2605.23315.title: Convergence Without Understanding: When Language Models Agree on Representations but Disagree on Reasoning
2605.23315.paper_summary: Large language models trained under diverse objectives and architectures have been shown to develop increasingly similar internal representations, an observation formalized as the Platonic Representation Hypothesis. Whether this representational convergence extends to the reasoning processes that operate over shared representations remains untested. We evaluate representational similarity across 16 language models from 8 families (1.5B to 72B parameters) on 800 reasoning problems spanning mathematics, science, commonsense, and truthfulness, stratifying by problem difficulty, computational stage, and causal relevance. Our analysis reveals three dissociations: a difficulty inversion, where models converge more on problems they collectively fail (Centered Kernel Alignment [CKA] = 0.897) than on those they solve (CKA = 0.830); a generation gap, where pre-decision representations align (CKA = 0.875) while post-decision representations diverge (CKA = 0.274); and epiphenomenal correctness, where shared information is decodable across models (66% transfer accuracy) but exerts minimal causal influence on predictions (1.5% to 5.5% flip rate across ablation protocols). These results indicate that representational convergence in language models reflects shared input processing constraints rather than shared reasoning strategies, with direct implications for ensemble design, interpretability transfer, and evaluations of model similarity. Code is available at https://github.com/Usama1002/convergence-without-understanding.
2605.23315.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在多樣的目標和架構下訓練，已顯示出越來越相似的內部表徵，這一觀察被正式化為柏拉圖表徵假說。這種表徵收斂是否擴展到在共享表徵上運作的推理過程尚未經過測試。我們評估了來自8個家族（1.5B到72B參數）的16個語言模型在800個推理問題上的表徵相似性，這些問題涵蓋數學、科學、常識和真實性，並根據問題難度、計算階段和因果相關性進行分層。我們的分析揭示了三個分離現象：一個難度反轉，即模型在集體失敗的問題上更趨於收斂（中心核對齊 [CKA] = 0.897），而不是在它們解決的問題上（CKA = 0.830）；一個生成差距，即決策前的表徵對齊（CKA = 0.875），而決策後的表徵則發散（CKA = 0.274）；以及表徵正確性，即共享信息在模型間是可解碼的（66% 轉移準確率），但對預測的因果影響極小（在消融協議中翻轉率為1.5%到5.5%）。這些結果表明，語言模型中的表徵收斂反映了共享的輸入處理限制，而非共享的推理策略，對於集成設計、可解釋性轉移和模型相似性評估具有直接的影響。代碼可在 https://github.com/Usama1002/convergence-without-understanding 獲得。
2605.23315.author: Muhammad Usama et.al.
